data.current_description: Access summary or statistical data for stocks, bonds, options, crypto, and more. Version 1 (deprecated) and version 2 available via Accept-Version header.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve stock and financial asset data
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves summary or statistical data for stocks, bonds, options, cryptocurrencies, and other financial instruments. Supports both API v1 (deprecated) and v2 via Accept-Version header. Returns a StockDataResponse object containing 15 data fields including price, volume, and market statistics. Requires API key authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Stock Data' is too generic. Description lacks clarity on expected inputs (parameters), specific output structure, and authentication requirements. Enhanced version specifies what data is returned, authentication needs, and references the StockDataResponse schema for AI agent clarity on response structure.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves real-time cryptocurrency quote data for specified digital assets. Accepts cryptocurrency identifier as input parameter.
